member_group_type.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือกนะจ๊ะ

root.sql:
select sum(tab.row_memno)over( partition by (member_group_no) order by tab.membership_no ,tab.seq_no , tab.member_group_no ) as rowno ,(CASE row_memno WHEN '1' THEN '1' ELSE null END) as check_nest --เขียนเพื่อให้ nest ออกแถวแรก ,tab.* from ( SELECT sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.client_id, (CASE lag(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no,1,null)over( order by sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.seq_no , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_group_no ) WHEN sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) as row_memno, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.seq_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_group_no, '!member_group_no_1!' as from_group, '!member_group_no_2!' as to_group, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.share_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.share_period, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.share_installment, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_contract, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_loantype, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_period, ( select member_group_type_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_type where member_group_type = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type ) as member_group_type_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type, (CASE sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_balance WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_installment END) as emer_installment , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_contract, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_loantype, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_period,
(CASE sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_balance WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_installment END) as norm_installment , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_contract, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_loantype, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_period, (CASE sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_balance WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_installment END) as spec_installment ,
sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.salary_amount, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ) as grp_con_name, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_intarr, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_intarr, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_intarr, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.balance_date, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.intarr_date, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id, sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control.control_desc , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_name ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_status_code ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.fund_amount FROM sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control WHERE ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control.control_id = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id ) and ( ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.client_id = '000' ) ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.share_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_intarr > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_intarr > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_intarr > 0 )
/*WHERE*/ --and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.balance_date = '30/04/2023' --and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type = '001' /*รายงานตัวนี้ มีใช้ formatting rules ในรายงานเด้อ*/ )tab

r_mwa_rep_mem_share_loan_year_nest_coll.sql: select tab.* from ( select pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no , 'X-XXXXX/XX' ) as loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance , (CASE lag( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no ,1,null)over( order by sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.seq_no , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_group_no ) WHEN sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no THEN null ELSE 1 END) as row_memno from sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year Where ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = {0} ) and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.balance_date = {1} )tab where row_memno = {2}
